cmd: from pathlib import Path; p=Path('artifacts/hello/hello.txt'); p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True); p.write_text('hello from node1\n', encoding='utf-8'); Path('artifacts/hello/stage1.done').write_text('ok\n', encoding='utf-8')

from pathlib import Path; p=Path('artifacts/hello/hello.txt'); p.write_text(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8') + 'hello from node2\n', encoding='utf-8'); Path('artifacts/hello/final.done').write_text('ok\n', encoding='utf-8')
